title: Postdoc and Faculty - Hangzhou, Zhejiang (CN) job with  ZHEJIANG CHINESE MEDICAL UNIVERSITY | 12861842
gist: A recruitment listing from the Institute of Precision Medicine at Zhejiang Chinese Medical University in Hangzhou, offering postdoc pay around 320K RMB and open faculty roles across an AI-and-biotechnology-equipped precision medicine institute.

insights.claim: The Institute of Precision Medicine at Zhejiang Chinese Medical University in Hangzhou is recruiting across postdoc, assistant, associate and full professor roles plus center directors, with applications open until 15 October 2026.
insights.speaker: Nature Biotechnology
insights.so_what: Signals continued Chinese institutional buildout of precision-medicine research talent capacity.
insights.quote: The open positions include postdoctoral research associate, assistant professor, associate professor and full professor. We also recruit center directors.

insights.claim: The postdoc salary is stated at about 320,000 RMB with faculty compensation negotiable, and both Chinese and non-Chinese nationals are eligible.
insights.speaker: Nature Biotechnology
insights.so_what: A concrete pay benchmark and open eligibility to foreign nationals reflect China's push to attract international biomedical researchers.
insights.quote: Both Chinese and non-Chinese nationals are eligible to apply.

insights.claim: The institute operates six research centers including Translational Medicine, Cell Therapy and Cardiovascular Disease research, plus an Artificial Intelligence and Biotechnology Center and a Center for Efficacy and Safety Evaluation of Medicine.
insights.speaker: Nature Biotechnology
insights.so_what: The explicit AI-plus-biotech and cell-therapy focus marks where this Chinese institution is concentrating investment.
insights.quote: including the Artificial Intelligence and Biotechnology Center and the Center for Efficacy and Safety Evaluation of Medicine
